name: LiPo Battery 1000mAh (603040 / 503450)

dimensions.note: Dimensions vary significantly by manufacturer -- verify before PCB design

estimatedKeyboardLife.assumptions: Based on ~1mA average BLE keyboard idle draw, 4-6 hours active use per day

summary: Balanced size and capacity — ~1 month BLE life
designNotes: Good capacity for keyboards with occasional LED use
May be too large for very slim split keyboard cases -- measure clearance carefully
Charge at 0.5C max (500mA) -- exceeds nice!nano's 100mA charger, will charge slower
At 100mA charge rate, full charge takes ~12-14 hours from empty
Consider BQ24075 or external charger with higher current for faster charging
JST PH polarity varies by manufacturer -- ALWAYS verify before connecting
Battery may need to be mounted under the MCU or in a separate compartment
features: Balanced capacity for most keyboard builds
3-6 weeks BLE battery life without LEDs
concerns: May be too large for slim split keyboard cases
Exceeds nice!nano's 100mA charge rate — full charge takes 12-14 hours
Requires external charger IC for reasonable charge times with larger cells
JST PH polarity varies by manufacturer — always verify
